hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess; data = json.load(sys.stdin); f = (data.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or (data.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath') or ''; ruff = '/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/bin/ruff'; [subprocess.run([ruff] + args + [f]) for args in [['check', '--fix'], ['format']]] if f.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true
